# unity3d-mcp — Unity 3D Engine Control

MCP server for Unity 3D automation: scene management, GameObjects, materials, animations, builds, VRM avatar pipeline, VRChat/ChilloutVR/Resonite/Cluster publishing. Backend port 10831, dashboard 10830.

## Tools

- `unity_core` — Project lifecycle (create/open/list), editor launch/control
- `unity_scene` — Scene CRUD, GameObjects, transforms, hierarchy
- `unity_bridge` — Hands-In (live Editor TCP bridge) vs Hands-Off (disk-only) execution mode
- `unity_render` — Agent vision: capture, multi-angle, scene summary
- `unity_vision_refine` — Review bundle + apply bridge commands from VLM feedback
- `unity_api` — Scene objects, modify, create_prefab, run_simulation, path movement
- `unity_jobs` — Async build, batch import, simulation
- `unity_asset` — Package import, 3D model import (FBX/OBJ/GLTF), texture/material management
- `unity_import` — Blender/fleet handoff: GLB/VRM/FBX batch import
- `unity_build` — Build for multiple platforms, preset management
- `unity_avatar` — VRM import, rigging setup, optimization, VRChat pipeline
- `unity_validation` — Scene/avatar preflight: polycount, materials, missing scripts, unified audit
- `vrchat` — VRChat SDK project setup, avatar upload, OSC
- `worldlabs` — Marble world import + assemble_review agent loop
- `platform` — Cross-platform audit: VRChat/CVR/Resonite/Cluster
- `list_vr_platforms` — List all supported social VR platforms
- `check_platform_sdk` — Check SDK installation for specific platform
- `check_cck_installed` — Check ChilloutVR CCK install
- `setup_cvr_avatar` — Configure CVRAvatar component
- `validate_for_chilloutvr` — Validate avatar for CVR upload
- `prepare_for_resonite` — Prepare VRM/GLB for Resonite direct import
- `check_resonite_compatibility` — Check model Resonite compatibility
- `check_cluster_kit` — Check Cluster Creator Kit install
- `prepare_for_cluster` — Prepare avatar for Cluster upload
- `api_execute_method` — Execute Unity Editor method with complex parameters
- `api_get_scene_objects` — Full scene object list with properties
- `api_modify_object` — Direct object property modification
- `api_create_prefab` — Create prefab with references
- `api_run_simulation` — Physics simulation with data recording
- `api_batch_operations` — Atomic multi-operation execution
- `api_move_along_path` — Animate object along path (straight/bezier/spline)
- `api_create_path_visualization` — Visual path representation
- `api_follow_path_2d/3d` — 2D/3D path following with look-ahead/banking

## Skills

- `unity-editor-automation` — Expert guide for Editor control
- `vrc-avatar-pipeline` — VRM to VRChat optimization guide

## Prompts

- `unity_setup_workflow` — Project initialization guide
- `vrc_avatar_workflow` — VRM optimization lifecycle

## Config

- Port: 10831 (backend), 10830 (frontend), 10835 (MCPBridge.cs TCP)
- Env: UNITY_EDITOR_PATH, UNITY_PROJECT_PATH
- Mode: Hands-In (live bridge) vs Hands-Off (batchmode/disk)

See [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt) for full tool reference.
